'''thangasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobby|dobby]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobby|dobby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thangasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thængæshæth|thængæshæth]] || [[word:thængæshæj|thængæshæj]] || [[word:thængæshæsh|thængæshæsh]] || [[word:thængæshæ|thængæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thangangashath|thangangashath]] || [[word:thangangashaj|thangangashaj]] || [[word:thangangashash|thangangashash]] || [[word:thangangasha|thangangasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangashath|thangashath]] || [[word:thangashaj|thangashaj]] || [[word:thangashash|thangashash]] || [[word:thangasha|thangasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangafshath|thangafshath]] || [[word:thangafshaj|thangafshaj]] || [[word:thangafshash|thangafshash]] || [[word:thangafshaf|thangafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thangashatha|thangashatha]] || [[word:thangashaja|thangashaja]] || [[word:thangashasha|thangashasha]] || [[word:thangashaka|thangashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thangashath|thangashath]] || [[word:thangashaj|thangashaj]] || [[word:thangashash|thangashash]] || [[word:thangasha|thangasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thangashathal|thangashathal]] || [[word:thangashajal|thangashajal]] || [[word:thangashashal|thangashashal]] || [[word:thangashakal|thangashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thangashathatha|thangashathatha]] || [[word:thangashajaja|thangashajaja]] || [[word:thangashashasha|thangashashasha]] || [[word:thangashaka|thangashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thangashathan|thangashathan]] || [[word:thangashajan|thangashajan]] || [[word:thangashashan|thangashashan]] || [[word:thangashakan|thangashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thangashathaoro|thangashathaoro]] || [[word:thangashajaoro|thangashajaoro]] || [[word:thangashashaoro|thangashashaoro]] || [[word:thangashakaoro|thangashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
